_comment: Candidate extraction config for English patent keyword extraction baseline.

candidate_length._comment: Token count bounds. max=4 is a practical default for technical phrases.

ngrams._comment: Active only when use_ngram_backoff=true. Keep ngram_max <= max_candidate_length.

normalization._comment: normalization_mode: 'conservative' (lowercase only) or 'lemma' (NOUN+ADJ lemmatization). Lemmatization requires apply_light_lemmatization=true.

output._comment: keep_duplicates=true retains multiple occurrences of the same candidate within a section (useful for frequency counting later). Set false to deduplicate within (row, section).

blacklist._comment: Path to the blacklist file. Exact normalized-form matching only. Edit blacklist.txt to add/remove entries.

section_weights._comment: Stored for future ranking stage. Not used by extraction. title_weight > 1 signals higher prior importance.
